name: Non-Compete Agreement (NCA)
description: A restrictive covenant preventing an employee or contractor from competing with the company for a specified period within a certain geographic area.
content:
NON-COMPETE AGREEMENT

This Non-Compete Agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of {{formatDate agreement_date}} by and between {{company_name}} (the "Company") and {{contractor_name}} (the "Contractor/Employee"), in connection with the {{relationship_type}} existing between the Parties.

1. THE PARTIES

Company: {{company_name}}, Address: {{company_address}}

Contractor/Employee: {{contractor_name}}, Address: {{contractor_address}}

2. NON-COMPETE COVENANT

The Contractor/Employee agrees that during the term of their relationship with the Company and for a period of {{duration}} following the termination of that relationship, they shall not, directly or indirectly, engage in, work for, consult with, or establish a business that competes with the Company's primary business of {{industry_field}}.

This restrictive covenant shall apply within the geographic area of {{geographic_scope}}.

3. CONFIDENTIALITY AND NON-SOLICITATION

The Contractor/Employee further agrees not to solicit or attempt to solicit any clients, customers, or current employees of the Company for the duration specified above. Furthermore, the Contractor/Employee shall maintain the strict confidentiality of all trade secrets, client lists, and proprietary business information belonging to the Company indefinitely.

4. BREACH AND LIQUIDATED DAMAGES

{{#if (eq liquidated_damages_apply 'Yes')}}

The Parties agree that a breach of this Agreement would cause irreparable harm to the Company. Therefore, in the event of a breach, the Contractor/Employee shall be liable to pay the Company the sum of {{penalty_amount}} as liquidated damages. The payment of liquidated damages does not preclude the Company from seeking injunctive relief or additional actual damages in a court of law.

{{else}}

In the event of a breach or threatened breach of this Agreement, the Company shall be entitled to seek injunctive relief to prevent such breach, in addition to pursuing any other legal or equitable remedies available for damages incurred.

{{/if}}

5. GOVERNING LAW AND SEVERABILITY

This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of {{jurisdiction}}. If any provision, duration, or geographic scope within this Agreement is found to be unreasonable or unenforceable by a court of competent jurisdiction, such provision shall be modified to the maximum extent permitted by law rather than voided entirely.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the Parties have executed this Non-Compete Agreement as of the date first above written.

For the Company
{{company_name}}

Signature: _________________________

Contractor/Employee
{{contractor_name}}

Signature: _________________________

fields.name: geographic_scope
fields.label: Geographic Scope (Restricted Area)
fields.placeholder: e.g., State of New York, 50-mile radius of HQ

fields.name: industry_field
fields.label: Industry / Restricted Field
fields.placeholder: e.g., E-commerce Logistics, Real Estate Brokerage

fields.name: jurisdiction
fields.label: Governing Law / Jurisdiction
fields.placeholder: e.g., State of California, UK Law
